name: Panax White Ginseng
summary: White ginseng is less processed Panax ginseng with less extract-specific evidence than red ginseng.
description: Less processed Panax ginseng root form with similar but not identical ginsenoside profile.
safetyNotes: Similar to red ginseng: insomnia, headache, possible hypoglycemia/interactions.
contraindications: Uncontrolled hypertension or acute infection or nosebleeds or heavy menstrual bleeding
may reduce the anticoagulant effect of warfarin based on case reports and ginsenoside antagonism studies
concurrent MAOI antidepressants such as phenelzine carry case reports of manic-like overstimulation
may potentiate insulin or oral diabetes medication through additive blood-sugar-lowering activity
pregnancy or breastfeeding without clinician guidance due to limited safety data.
